zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Vaughn於1428年出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Vaughan28歲，母親Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan26歲。她於1466年與Sir Robert Whitney在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年5月4日之後在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Vaughn was born in 1428, in Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Vaughan, was 28 and her mother, Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan, was 26. She married Sir Robert Whitney in 1466, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 4 May 1525, in England.

Elle a épousé Sir Robert Whitney en 1466, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 4 mai 1525, à Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughn(이)가 1428년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Vaughan(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Robert Whitney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 5월 4일 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Vaughn родилась в 1428 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Vaughan было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Whitney в 1466 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 4 май 1525 г. в местности Англия.
